info.title: Logi Composer Rest API
info.description: The Composer REST API provides methods for retrieving, updating, and deleting Composer metadata. With the API endpoints, you can manage connections, data sources, accounts, groups, and users quickly and easily.

tags.name: trusted-access-session
tags.description: Manage user sessions via Trusted Access

get.summary: Retrieve a visual (requires READ permission to the visual)
get.description: Returns a visual specified by id

401.description: The user must be logged in

403.description: The user doesn't have privilege to do the operation

put.summary: Updates a visual (requires WRITE permission to the visual) or creates a new visual with custom id (requires the ROLE_CREATE_VISUALS privilege)

parameters.name: suppressWarnings
parameters.description: The response to this API endpoint may return a validation error with a list of problems. Each problem has a level (ERROR, WARNING). Passing suppressWarnings=true will suppress all warnings and the request will succeed if there are no errors

parameters.name: warningTags
parameters.description: If suppressWarning is true, then warning tags can be passed in this field. Any top level element(SOURCE/VISUAL/DASHBOARD) that may be impacted due to any WARNING will get these warning tags attached to them.

401.description: The user must be logged in

403.description: The user doesn't have privilege to do the operation

404.description: The visual or the source of visual was not found

delete.summary: Deletes a visual (requires DELETE permission to the visual)

400.description: The visual is used by at least one dashboard

401.description: The user must be logged in

403.description: The user doesn't have privilege to do the operation

fileData.description:
File must have specific structure:

``` 

Field Label,languageLocaleId1,languageLocaleId2 

fieldLabel1,labelTranslate1,labelTranslate2

 ```
